page_content:
Enrichment

Enrichment

Minimum 3 credits from any 300- or 400-level BSCI, CHEM, or BCHM course.

1 Starting Fall 2012, only BSCI353 satisﬁes the Neurobiology course requirement that was previously fulﬁlled by BSCI446 or BSCI453.

2 Formerly BSCI474, cross-listed as HLSC374. Credit will be given for either BSCI374, HLSC374 or BSCI474.
